reviews.comment:
Lo visitamos en Época no turistica, los baños No estaban en condiciones, el full service totalmente incompleto ,sin  siquiera medialunas. No tenían ni el vaso termico con tapa para viaje. Eso hubiera Sido secundario sin contar que presencié que quien limpiaba agredió verbalmente a una turista que tuvo q cruzarse al baño de Axion.
Estaría bien aceptar críticas, para convertirlas en aciertos y MEJORAS

(Translated by Google)
We visited during the off-season. The restrooms were in poor condition, the full service was completely incomplete, without even croissants. They didn't even have a travel mug with a lid. That would have been a minor issue, except that I witnessed the cleaning staff verbally assault a tourist who had to use the restroom at the Axion gas station. It would be good to accept criticism and turn it into improvements.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXM2NDY1VBEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención de los chicos es muy buena. Lamentablemente los baños eran un desastre. Cargamos nafta, desayunamos pero no pudimos utilizar los baños x la falta de higiene.
Asumo que debe ser xq El bolsón estaba muy lleno de gente y entraba y salía del baño constantemente gente que ni estaba consumiendo en la ypf. Ojalá puedan mejorar ese aspecto ya que para los que viajamos mucho es importante contar con ese servicio. El resto muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very helpful. Unfortunately, the restrooms were a disaster. We filled up with gas and had breakfast, but we couldn't use the restrooms because of the lack of hygiene.

I assume it's because the gas station was very crowded, and people who weren't even buying anything were constantly going in and out of the restroom. I hope they can improve that aspect, as it's important for those of us who travel a lot to have that service. Everything else was great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaHZDYW1BRRAB
